column1: • Unstructured data: e.g., images, videos, audio files
- Key difference: unstructured data doesn't follow a specific format
- NoSQL: Not Only SQL, a type of database that doesn't follow traditional table-based structure
- SQL: Structured Query Language, a traditional database management system
- Create a Language Model (LLM) using the RATHOD model
- Provide feedback through the RATHOD model
- Main goal: create a database storage system
- Use API calls to interact with the database (using NVIDIA API keys)
- Use API calls to interact with the database, rather than downloading the LLM and working offline
- This will make the process easier, but may require more space
- Complete the assignment by today evening
